title: Settings
subtitle: Adjust how LabTether looks and works

agents.title: Connect Agents
agents.newTokenDescription: Your enrollment token is ready — copy it now:
agents.createEnrollmentTokenDescription: Generate a token for a new agent to enroll with
agents.deleteCount: Delete {count} dead token(s)? This cannot be undone.

oidc.title: OIDC / SSO
oidc.description: Configure an OpenID Connect provider for single sign-on. Fields marked ENV are set via environment variables and cannot be overridden here.
oidc.autoProvision: Auto-provision new users on first login

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: This will clear the collected history (devices, metrics, logs, sessions, alerts, incidents, and credentials). Your login and app settings stay safe.
dangerZone.confirmDescription: This will permanently wipe collected operational data. Your account and settings are not touched. Type RESET below to confirm.

security.title: Account Security
security.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
security.twoFactorDisabled: Two-factor authentication is not enabled. Add an extra layer of security to your account.
security.scanQR: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app, or enter the secret key manually.
security.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
security.recoveryCodesDescription: These codes can be used to access your account if you lose your authenticator device. Each code can only be used once. Store them in a safe place — they will not be shown again.
security.enterCodeToDisable: Enter your authenticator code or a recovery code to disable 2FA
security.enterCodeToRegen: Enter your authenticator code to regenerate recovery codes
security.newRecoveryCodesDescription: Your previous recovery codes have been invalidated. Store these new codes in a safe place.
security.invalidCodeOrRecovery: Enter a 6-digit code or recovery code

prometheus.title: Prometheus Export
prometheus.description: Configure Prometheus metrics export: scrape endpoint, remote_write push, and process-level telemetry.
prometheus.scrapeDescription: Exposes a standard Prometheus scrape endpoint at /metrics. Add this URL to your Prometheus scrape config.
prometheus.remoteWriteDescription: Pushes metrics to a Prometheus-compatible remote_write endpoint on the configured interval.
prometheus.processMetricsDescription: Collects CPU and memory usage for the top-N processes and includes them in the exported metrics.

backup.title: Backup & Export
backup.description: Export your hub configuration as JSON for backup or migration.

discoveryDefaults.title: Service Discovery Defaults
discoveryDefaults.description: Fleet defaults for agent web-service discovery. Apply to 1-2 canary agents first, validate Services results, then roll out broadly.
discoveryDefaults.lanScanWarning: LAN scan should remain disabled by default unless explicitly required. When enabled, use narrow private CIDRs and minimal port lists.

apiKeys.heading: // API Keys
apiKeys.description: Create and manage API keys for programmatic access to the LabTether REST API v2.
apiKeys.adminRequired: API key management requires admin access.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.emptyState: No API keys yet. Create one to enable programmatic access.
apiKeys.revealWarning: This key will not be shown again. Copy it now.
apiKeys.revokeBody: Revoke key "{name}"? Any integrations using this key will immediately lose access. This cannot be undone.

mcp.heading: // MCP Connection
mcp.description: Connect AI agents (Claude, OpenClaw, etc.) to LabTether via the Model Context Protocol.
mcp.authNote: Uses session authentication. API key authentication coming soon.

apiReference.heading: // API Reference
apiReference.description: Interactive documentation for the LabTether REST API v2 with request/response schemas.
